sections.title: Writing Task 1
sections.instructions: You should spend about 20 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: The plans below show the site of a farm in 1950 and the same site today. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

sections.title: Writing Task 2
sections.instructions: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: In many countries, primary and secondary schools close for two months or more in the summer holidays. What is the value of long school holidays? What are the arguments in favour of shorter school holidays? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.
